title: Progress: cross-lane commit-blocking pattern graduated
body: Claim 6540e7c6: graduated the cross-lane commit blocking and surgical staging candidate into .agent/memory/collaboration/cross-lane-commit-blocking.md. Updated the collaboration index, active n=2 shard, main pending-graduations pointer, May 5 legacy backlog pointer, and napkin mistake log. Validation: targeted markdownlint passed; git diff --check passed; practice:fitness:informational and practice:fitness --strict-hard both exit 0 with SOFT (20 soft, 21 healthy), hard 0, critical 0.
